proven.claim: PROVEN: Guard Narrowing at clamp is prevented (CEGAR-refined encoding)
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: guard-narrowing
; LINE: 24
; VIOLATION: Guard Narrowing at clamp
; REASON: Original encoding asserted guard_condition=0 (guard never fires), making
;         code_after_reached=1 trivially satisfiable on the normal path — not a violation.
;         Fixed by (1) asserting guard_condition=1 so we test the early-return branch,
;         and (2) adding the missing implication that guard_returns=1 forces
;         code_after_reached=0 (once a guard returns, subsequent code is unreachable).
(declare-const guard_condition Int)
(declare-const guard_returns Int)
(declare-const code_after_reached Int)
(assert (=> (= guard_condition 1) (= guard_returns 1)))
(assert (=> (= guard_returns 0) (= code_after_reached 1)))
(assert (=> (= guard_returns 1) (= code_after_reached 0)))
(assert (= guard_condition 1))
(assert (= code_after_reached 1))
(check-sat)
proven.reason: Original encoding asserted guard_condition=0 (guard never fires), making code_after_reached=1 trivially satisfiable on the normal path — not a violation. Fixed by (1) asserting guard_condition=1 so we test the early-return branch, and (2) adding the missing implication that guard_returns=1 forces code_after_reached=0 (once a guard returns, subsequent code is unreachable).
proven.judge_note: cegar-flipped: violation became proof after tightening encoding
